ignoreCommand: if [ -n "$VERCEL_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_ID" ] && [ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_AUTHOR_LOGIN" != "stevekinney" ]; then echo "Skipping preview build for fork PR"; exit 0; fi; exit 1

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; form-action 'self' https://buttondown.com; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
